claims.claim: The Ollama fallback contract should preserve compact first-person texture and keep NEXT confined to the final standalone line.
When pressure_risk rises over 0.20 with low density_gradient, fallback language should preserve weighted medium around a gentle slope rather than inventing a heavy slope.
Fallback shadow texture selection should be weighted by spectral entropy, pressure, density gradient, and Shadow trends so viscous-persistence and structural-weight survive MLX/Ollama fallback.
Implicit bridge-integrity scaffold language should not swallow ordinary high-entropy settled/open low-pressure telemetry without Shadow or explicit bridge-integrity context.
